resource_processor.name: Resource Processor Agent
resource_processor.description: Extracts key takeaways and summaries from all uploaded content (bookmarks, PDFs, images, Notion pages, YouTube links), follows nested links to extract deeper content, and auto-categorizes each resource under the 39 topic categories.

kb_retrieval.name: KB Retrieval Agent
kb_retrieval.description: Searches the indexed knowledge base of all processed resources to find relevant summaries, tools, workflows, guides, and prompts matching the user's query.

web_research.name: Web Research Agent
web_research.description: Extends search to the live web to find latest tools, pricing details, subscription costs, comparisons, and emerging resources not yet in the knowledge base.

knowledge_orchestrator.name: Knowledge Orchestrator
knowledge_orchestrator.description: Coordinates sub-agents to answer user queries by combining indexed resource knowledge with live web research, aggregates results into a unified recommendation or summary with citations and direct links.

output_delivery.name: Output Delivery Agent
output_delivery.description: Formats query results into downloadable PDF documents or structures and pushes content directly into the user's Notion workspace as formatted pages.
